title: Prevent Aging
description: Simpler server side mod that makes applying a name tag to a baby animal prevent any further aging
body:
![Baby Goats Forever](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MzzIBU8X/images/ea78f5afa1a71a918cf03a960a12b9d94ca6565e.png)

Simple server side mod that makes applying a name tag to a baby animal prevent any further aging.
